status: Generated Dart OpenAPI boundary is committed under lib/generated/api and pinned by .openapi-sha256. Active MVP backend calls must use generated path constants or be listed as explicit handwritten client exceptions.

handwritten_client_exceptions./user/stats: Legacy local learning-stats sync retained until frontend migrates to learning history/report APIs.
handwritten_client_exceptions./user/stats/session: Legacy local learning-stats sync retained until frontend migrates practice completion to /practice and /learning evidence APIs.
handwritten_client_exceptions./user/stats/session/feedback: Legacy local feedback stats sync retained until frontend migrates practice completion to /practice and /learning evidence APIs.
handwritten_client_exceptions./user/stats/session-group/delete: Legacy local stats cleanup retained until frontend migrates history deletion to /learning/history/{history_entry_id}.
handwritten_client_exceptions./cards: Legacy card feed outside MVP backend active endpoint set.
handwritten_client_exceptions./cards/$cardId/state: Legacy card state endpoint outside MVP backend active endpoint set.
handwritten_client_exceptions./ai/scene-draft: Legacy freeform scene draft endpoint outside the two-scenario MVP backend stage.
handwritten_client_exceptions./ai/sessions: Legacy freeform AI scene session endpoint outside the MVP backend practice-session API.
handwritten_client_exceptions./ai/sessions/$sessionId/message: Legacy freeform AI scene message endpoint outside the MVP backend practice-session API.
handwritten_client_exceptions./user/roles/sync: Legacy role-memory endpoint outside Product Base MVP backend scope.
handwritten_client_exceptions./user/roles/$trimmedRoleId/memory: Legacy role-memory endpoint outside Product Base MVP backend scope.
handwritten_client_exceptions./user/learning-profile: Legacy learning profile endpoint retained until learning-memory projections are wired to frontend.
handwritten_client_exceptions./ai/scene-turn-meta: Legacy scene metadata endpoint outside MVP backend practice-session API.
handwritten_client_exceptions./ai/translate: Legacy translation helper outside MVP backend active endpoint set.
handwritten_client_exceptions./ai/conversation-summary: Legacy freeform scene summary endpoint outside MVP backend practice-session API.
handwritten_client_exceptions./ai/oral-assessment/auth: External provider auth helper retained as platform/provider exception.
handwritten_client_exceptions./ai/grammar-score: Legacy grammar score helper outside current OpenAPI pronunciation/coach-turn boundary.
